sentences.text: However, he continued bravely, and eventually he reached the market.
After waiting there for some time, he sold the sack of flour for a very good price, and then he returned home immediately because he was afraid he might meet robbers if he stayed too late.

'It has certainly been a hard day,' said little Hans to himself as he was going to bed, 'but I am glad I did not refuse the Miller because he is my best friend, and besides, he is going to give me his wheelbarrow.'
Early the next morning, the Miller came to get the money for his sack of flour, but little Hans was so tired that he was still in bed.
